appraisal_events.evidence: « Vous n'êtes pas de votre temps … et je vous en félicite … Des efforts tels que les vôtres devraient être encouragés si nous avions un gouvernement. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Norpois, an eminent former ambassador, explicitly flatters Bloch as exceptional and above a degraded age, which locally elevates Bloch even as the narrator frames Norpois’s compliments as vague and strategic.

status_effects.explanation: Bloch’s standing rises locally because a prestigious figure praises his disinterested studies and singles him out as surpassing his time.
